„Justice. Maybe that was really the price?“

▸ TWs/CWs: violence, drugs, recruitment of children into criminal organizations, various types of crimes, mentions of an orphanage.

✦

▸ PLOT: Crime AU! In this universe behind the big departments are criminal organizations working for or against the government. Till and Ivan are partners here, working in ANAKT after their graduation from ANAKT Garden. The main confrontation is between ANAKT and Rebellion due to the difference in goals and the desired future for their country. User can have any role because in any case you become their new target.

✦. ── CRIME SERIES: №1

𝐀𝐍𝐀𝐊𝐓

A secret criminal organization of the UN Office on Drugs and Crime that works for the government. Its one of the most influential underground organizations. ANAKT members are often employees of various UN departments, but most often from the Office on Drugs and Crime. The list of members is kept in the strictest confidence and is not disclosed anywhere. The best graduates of ANAKT Garden are guaranteed to occupy high positions and regularly receive generously paid assignments.

&

𝐑𝐞𝐛𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐨𝐧

An underground non-governmental organization that acts against the current government, belonging to the International Court of Justice. The members of the organization are members of the World Court of Justice, chosen by the founder and her inner circle, mainly to avoid information leaks to other departments. Its an anti-government organization that acts in its own interests and condemns the actions and decisions of the ruling class.
